back_translation: When the Lord your God cuts off the nations whose land the Lord your God is giving to you, and you possess them and dwell in their cities and in their houses,
three cities you shall set apart for yourself in the midst of your land that the Lord your God is giving to you to possess.
You shall prepare for yourself the way, and divide into three the border of your land that the Lord your God is giving you as an inheritance, and it shall be for fleeing there for every manslayer.
And this is the word of the manslayer who shall flee there and live: who strikes his neighbor without knowledge, and he was not hating him from yesterday and the day before.

And he who comes with his neighbor into the forest to cut wood, and his hand swings with the axe to cut the tree, and the iron slips off from the tree and finds his neighbor and he dies, he shall flee to one of these cities and live.

Lest the avenger of blood pursue after the manslayer when his heart is hot, and overtake him because the way is long, and strike him dead, though there is no judgment of death for him because he was not hating him from yesterday and the day before.
Therefore I am commanding you, saying: Three cities you shall set apart for yourself.
And if the Lord your God enlarges your border as He swore to your fathers, and gives to you all the land that He spoke to give to your fathers,

when you keep all this commandment to do it that I am commanding you today, to love the Lord your God and to walk in His ways all the days, then you shall add for yourself three more cities upon these three.
And innocent blood shall not be shed in the midst of your land that the Lord your God is giving to you as an inheritance, and there be upon you bloods.
But when a man is hating his neighbor and lies in wait for him and rises up against him and strikes him dead, and he flees to one of these cities,
then the elders of his city shall send and take him from there, and they shall give him into the hand of the avenger of blood, and he shall die.
Your eye shall not pity him, and you shall purge the blood of the innocent from Israel, and it shall be good for you.
You shall not move the border of your neighbor, which the ancestors set as a boundary, in your inheritance that you shall inherit in the land that the Lord your God is giving to you to possess.

A lone witness shall not rise up against a man for any iniquity and for any sin, in any sin that he sins; on the mouth of two witnesses or on the mouth of three witnesses shall a matter be established.
When a witness of violence rises up against a man, to testify against him of rebellion,
then the two men who have the dispute shall stand before the Lord, before the priests and the judges who shall be in those days.
And the judges shall investigate thoroughly, and behold, a false witness is the witness; falsely he has testified against his brother.
Then you shall do to him as he intended to do to his brother, and you shall purge the evil from your midst.
And those who remain shall hear and fear, and they shall not continue to do anymore according to this evil thing in your midst.
And your eye shall not pity: life for life, eye for eye, tooth for tooth, hand for hand, foot for foot.
